On 03/17/2013 17:51, Koop Mast wrote:
> Please update your ports. Goffice was fixed on 13th of March. And I
> just successfully rebuild abiword and gnumeric. Shotwell probably
> needs a update. I patched gtk-equinox-engine just now, thanks. Let
> me know if you still have problems.
Yes, I know about Goffice. Thanks.
